design_plan: rng=42; AIDA pass; hero width math ~1120px yields 2–3 lines; bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep includes Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok; button contrast checked on #0a0a0a vs #ffffff.
headline: Super vs ChatGPT

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, editorial comparison for people choosing between Super and ChatGPT—explaining what ChatGPT excels at and why Super is the sharper alternative for repeated computer-use workflows thanks to its computer-use cache.
